data.title: Trump Administration Sets Ultimatum For Russia-Ukraine Peace Talks: 'Not Going To Continue With This Endeavour For Weeks And Months,' Says Secretary Of State Rubio
data.description: President Donald Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have issued an ultimatum for the Russia-Ukraine peace talks, stating the U.S. will abandon efforts unless progress is made in the coming days.

data.title: Hertz CEO Encouraged By Bill Ackman's Major Investment: 'We Should All Feel Encouraged'
data.description: Hertz CEO Gil West expressed optimism following Bill Ackman's significant investment in the company.

data.title: Ford Reportedly Halts Vehicle Shipments To China Amid Rising Tariffs
data.description: Ford has reportedly stopped exporting certain high-end vehicles to China due to increased tariffs.

data.title: Trump's Top Economic Adviser Kevin Hassett Says White House Is Exploring Options To Fire Fed Chair Jerome Powell: 'The President And His Team Will Continue To Study'
data.description: White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett confirmed that the Trump administration is exploring ways to remove Jerome Powell.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Delays Launch Of Affordable Model Y By Several Months: Report
data.description: Tesla delays US launch of affordable Model Y SUV, with production target of 250K units by 2026. Performance models also planned.
